title: Restaurant Manager
description:
Join Our Team as a Restaurant Manager!

Are you a passionate leader with a love for hospitality and a flair for delivering exceptional service?

Mediterranean Restaurant with Pizza, Grill and Deli specializing in Greek Cuisine is looking for an experienced Restaurant Manager.

📩

- What we offer -

  • Competitive salary package
  • Generous staff benefits
  • Opportunities for career growth and advancement
  • A dynamic, supportive, and culturally rich work environment
  • The chance to be part of a thriving restaurant with a loyal customer base

-Responsiblities-

  • Oversee daily restaurant operations, ensuring smooth coordination between Front-of-House and the kitchen.
  • Uphold the authenticity of our Greek cuisine and cultural dining experience.
  • Lead, train, and motivate staff to deliver top-tier customer service.
  • Monitor inventory, manage supply orders, and liaise directly with Greek ingredient suppliers.
  • Handle customer feedback and resolve issues professionally.
  • Develop marketing initiatives, collaborating with Greek associations and cultural communities.
  • Ensure compliance with hygiene, safety, and regulatory standards.
  • Manage budgets, payroll, and cost controls to achieve business profitability.
  • Plan and organize special events such as Greek festivals, wine tastings, and live music nights

-Requirements-

  • Proven experience as a Restaurant Manager, preferably in Mediterranean or Greek dining.
  • Strong leadership, communication, and people-management skills.
  • Proficiency in English is required; knowledge of additional languages is an advantage.
  • Solid understanding of Greek cuisine, wines, and cultural dining traditions.
  • Financial and operational management experience, including budgeting and revenue growth.
  • Flexibility to work evenings, weekends, and public holidays.

postedCompany.description:
Welcome to Pano Kato

What started as a playful game of word in Greek, resulted in the name of Anne-Jean Liétaer's culinary adventure: Pano Kato, opened in 2018.

The Greek origin of the words Pano Kato refers to the Mediterranean cuisine that is served in all its simplicity. Simple, unpretentious, pure are key words in Anne-Jean’s taste for delicious home cooked style food using great ingredients from the Mediterranean Sea and Region.

Our stylish restaurant with its bright and airy space is decked out in white and rattan furnishings, also has lovely green accents for a tropical touch. Perfect atmosphere for your business or family dinner parties. You can look forward to a wide selection of family-friendly dishes that are great for sharing.

All our dishes are made with natural ingredients
imported from parts of Europe. 

Gluten free and vegan options are also available.
postedCompany.name: MAISON ANLI (PTE. LTD.)

districts.location: D10 Ardmore, Bukit Timah, Holland Road, Tanglin
